author: mrdavtan
name: Non-record: FP16 Embed + WD20k + Seq2048 + Sliding Window + Doc-Isolated Eval
blurb: Stacks proven community techniques on 9L baseline: FP16 tied embedding export, aggressive warmdown (WD=20000), seq2048 training, tuned LRs, sliding window eval (stride=64) with doc-isolated scoring. Score limited by slow RunPod node (70ms/step vs typical 44ms). Expect ~1.185 on standard hardware.
changes_from_baseline: FP16 tied embedding export (tok_emb.weight kept in fp16, avoids int8 compounding)
WARMDOWN_ITERS=20000 (aggressive LR decay for tighter weight distributions)
Sliding window eval stride=64 with doc-isolated scoring
notes: Score limited by hardware: 70ms/step on this RunPod node vs 44ms typical. Only 8,528 steps vs ~13,000 on standard hardware.
